testcase.name: Holiday Calendar Master Tests - All 66 Test Cases › TC-02-003: Search Holiday by Year equals operator

failure.message: holiday_calendar_tests.spec.ts:248:7 TC-02-003: Search Holiday by Year equals operator

testcase.failure: [chromium] › holiday_calendar_tests.spec.ts:248:7 › Holiday Calendar Master Tests - All 66 Test Cases › TC-02-003: Search Holiday by Year equals operator › Verify search results Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed Locator: locator('table tbody tr').first().locator('td').nth(1) Expected string: "2026" Received string: "Holidays Year" Timeout: 10000ms Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator('table tbody tr').first().locator('td').nth(1) 14 × locator resolved to … - unexpected value "Holidays Year" 267 | if (await tableRows.count() > 0) { 268 | const yearCell = tableRows.first().locator('td').nth(1); > 269 | await expect(yearCell).toContainText('2026'); | ^ 270 | } 271 | await helper.takeScreenshot('screenshots/TC-02-003/04-verify_results.png'); 272 | }); at D:\Automate-Cello\playwright-test\tests\holiday_calendar_tests.spec.ts:269:32 at D:\Automate-Cello\playwright-test\tests\holiday_calendar_tests.spec.ts:265:5 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\holiday_calendar_tests-Hol-3b030-day-by-Year-equals-operator-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\holiday_calendar_tests-Hol-3b030-day-by-Year-equals-operator-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\holiday_calendar_tests-Hol-3b030-day-by-Year-equals-operator-chromium\error-context.md
